message:
refactor(simd): replace manual index arithmetic with chunks_exact iterators

Rewrite dot_product_f16_f32 and dot_product_f32_f32_unchecked to use
chunks_exact(8) iterators instead of manual index/base arithmetic:

- Replace hand-computed `base = chunk_index * 8` indexing with
  chunks_exact(8).by_ref().zip() iteration over paired slices
- Use .remainder() for the scalar tail loop instead of manual
  `(chunks * 8)..len` range indexing
- Shorter, more idiomatic, and eliminates a class of off-by-one
  potential in the manual index math
- Functionally equivalent: same SIMD 8-wide accumulation with scalar
  remainder, same f16→f32 conversion path

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
